sentences.arabic: يَدْرُسُ خَالِدٌ الرِّيَاضِيَّاتِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ بَعْدَ الظُّهْرِ.
sentences.translation: Halid uči matematiku svaki dan poslijepodne.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid studies mathematics every day in the afternoon.
He sometimes finds some questions difficult.
He asks his father about the difficult problems.

sentences.translation: Otac mu objašnjava na jednostavan način.
sentences.translationEn: His father explains to him in an easy way.
